title: How are souls gathered in Evangelion
display_title: How are souls gathered in Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: How are souls gathered in Evangelion?             Quote Post by Duality » Tue Dec 07, 2010 1:42 am Hi folks! First post and it has to be this question: It's driven me insane since I first saw the series as a child. How on Earth are the souls in Evangelion 'captured'? I know that Shinji and Asuka's mothers souls were absorbed into the Evas during the contact experiments, but what about Unit 00's? (Rei I's?) What about Rei II and III's? How is the 'soul' of Rei I for example (Lillith's Soul I guess) transferred into Rei II, and Rei II -> III? This is something that has driven me absolutely nuts. Does anybody know? Worse, I never even get results for this via Google. Oh yeah and Tabris has Adam's soul too? Wha? Is Lillith involved somehow? Any help would be amazing. A loose end I've never tied up.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Tue Dec 07, 2010 2:16 am The souls seem to be tied to the bodies, and can somehow be "pulled" from one body to another when the bodies undergo "contact" of some form or other. Evidence: Shogouki takes Shinji's soul and what remains of his body into her core. Of course, this isn't soul transference, this is just an indication of body and soul remaining together. Kentucky-Fried Rei: they retrieve her, presumably in order to transfer her soul into another clone. The Eva souls: as you mentioned, contact with the Eva is necessary to move the soul into the Eva. Kaworu/Adam: that would have been a really interesting scene. Did Gendo just need the head or did he collect the rest of the goo, too? Some people think that Adam made his own way back home, but if Adam did so, why didn't Lilith go back home after Rei was Kentucky-Fried? Given the evidence, I think that Nerv must have a way of pulling a soul out of one body and into another. The souls are never "free floating". Neither Lilith or the souls themselves seem to have any control over the process.

[]: Re: How are souls gathered in Evangelion?             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Dec 07, 2010 2:29 am Duality wrote: How on Earth are the souls in Evangelion 'captured'?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 07, 2010 2:57 am Baz wrote: Shogouki takes Shinji's soul and what remains of his body into her core.

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Tue Dec 07, 2010 5:16 am I always imagined that all souls return to Lilith. The soul is then transferred from lilith to the next closest thing, Rei clone. Then simply the Rei clone along with the desired soul are absorbed into the Eva's core. This of course is complete fan wanking and has nothing to back it up, just one way for me to make sense of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Dec 07, 2010 11:24 am [URL=http://img695.imageshack.us/i/85236678.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Dec 07, 2010 1:08 pm Yui IS the Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Duality » Tue Dec 07, 2010 9:15 pm Xard wrote: [URL=http://img695.imageshack.us/i/85236678.jpg/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Dec 22, 2010 7:40 am Reichu wrote: Just think of Ghostbusters .

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 22, 2010 8:09 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: Am I credited for starting the soul-salvaging = Ghostbusters theory? I sure hope so. You have too many of the fun, outrageously silly theories out there.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Dec 22, 2010 8:13 am Reichu wrote: regardless of whoever posted it first, I think enough people have seen Ghostbusters that a similar "conclusion" could be independently reached without much effort.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 22, 2010 8:19 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: Perhaps, but of all the NGE topics, the "how do they collect souls?" isn't one of the more common ones.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Dec 22, 2010 8:28 am Reichu wrote: It comes up as an aside now and again. :p (My memory may also be incorporating non-EGF conversations.)
